name: Christy Smith for Congress
subject: This photo shows why we HAVE to defeat Garcia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

This is Mike Garcia holding a rally in our district the day after Governor Newsom ordered wearing face coverings in public spaces:

| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba56/29776869/9de7d1f/569ece6d/3259044589/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjFfcnJnYXJjaWFyYWxseS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200621_rrgarciarally-full")
---

He is risking the lives of his supporters at a time when we are seeing a spike in COVID-19 hospitalizations in Ventura County, and cases are still incredibly high in Los Angeles County.

It is just the latest example of why Garcia has absolutely no business representing our district. With your help we can limit the damage he does by booting him out of office in just a few short months.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more to our campaign right now? COVID-19 is real, people are dying, no matter how much Garcia and his idol, Donald Trump, wish it would just go away.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba56/29776869/9de7d1f/569ece6d/3259044589/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjFfcnJnYXJjaWFyYWxseS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200621_rrgarciarally-full")**

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I hope this email finds you well and that you are celebrating Father's Day surrounded by the people you love. I am blessed to have a father who instilled in me and my siblings the values that guide me to this day: honesty, integrity and the importance of giving back to your community. My father always pushed us to be a part of the solution rather than a part of the problem. I hope to be same type of father to my children and grandchildren.

It has been a great week for Team Hunt and I am encouraged by the momentum we are generating as we advance into the summer.

On Monday, I released my new digital ad Service, conveying my mindset about service and my belief that our elected officials must honor their commitments to their voters and our country.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=baff0b4ecc6c4fda9bdea35a4b946b9d&_e=ZK1WX89-hsIA_nEMMkk9qdqMYL1XMRP5f0yaUqDrFS2ZabcLoGfkbYhbxY6K-UQhUc2N-4OwTnC1-5ljwUMEVv91FsiHxtkqnF2jP-VoWb3xnjAmPBgwLzh3bIfABOlOQ5psSWo-9WdTyLzycvTR--P40aPcfUwsabw2paYSOe037XSzPwtmTKToZJHw63WNy0DEQt4uHYx9IgMdv6IvR0TFoYb6pGrmgPDNdpB_x4Dk4olIzrjAeEK0JVDtBvnwvKZQxZe5PtzzdnHoJsmJmTZGXNUWft9J7xniHd4OcuY%3D)

On Tuesday, Mayor Jim Pappas formally endorsed my campaign. I am honored by Mayor Pappas' support and look forward to working alongside community leaders like Mayor Pappas to deliver results for Texas' 7th Congressional District.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=baff0b4ecc6c4fda9bdea35a4b946b9d&_e=ZK1WX89-hsIA_nEMMkk9qbmps29gEb-QC2n-fvP-Soik4o9u945djNDGCoCqedNXsOaNYf3Q317t8KqCVuc2Ai9DHO0YBv6HMJ29qbYeq70_KM8ZuPNRyntRfv7uO6et-UW8WkV-7Gc-JDBLnAf6D8iCIqQfrstTj_ZePhvjtFV0K7q8Gkzg-4_T6RCzPtVJlthsR8HXq7a1_kXYeJGy940oiU_AxRyKVcX28_M1I7JqWtlBzKLqyKcPssMvwOn-9SMQ1zKPf_RtZvjxrMwDAQyV1pjTCWfeYlkiDqF4lwRrTUDaY5C8CXCGRlQqWvns)

On Wednesday, I released the latest segment of Ask Wes, where I answered a question from Michael in West University concerning the gridlock in Washington that is paralyzing progress around our country.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=baff0b4ecc6c4fda9bdea35a4b946b9d&_e=ZK1WX89-hsIA_nEMMkk9qbmps29gEb-QC2n-fvP-Soik4o9u945djNDGCoCqedNXuxI0qVDs0Sf3PhqSNDmDKtKMjsHL_49KjWEeV0e0lnrF4OZImVitgRRhMRVbmwJ4yWw1JwS7HPguuN5A0YncuUK-FCyiwa1Gk9zqySnBAVMl8airz3Raw7hznVK20_m8hHx5D0wMZkpEdyIIuS4SwpBtfNP3j2DWwFXy8mC5mWRYEDnny3LVSgC5rt9NlTIJl9ZPQHpTnF9xTwkWCts9xa_yYC4TQ14vE86_g1HkL0VHlIv9SLnjkf1MXuIkwCkk)

On Friday, I joined Fox and Friends to discuss the 155th anniversary of Juneteenth, the day on which emancipation was formally declared for African Americans enslaved in Texas. Juneteenth is a celebration of the progress possible within our great Nation and a reminder of the possibilities we have for greatness when we are willing to work together.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=baff0b4ecc6c4fda9bdea35a4b946b9d&_e=ZK1WX89-hsIA_nEMMkk9qdqMYL1XMRP5f0yaUqDrFS2T9XrWIPO_Xc-pO4u3UkizyW33lh1lTv53J8x6A4muml7TADdk8AvNmgB9nPnB5DRHhN73qsXIbTB-PaDDZOw0A0Almv3BuQVDQ-U4Oal8ePS9-QsLNAqeBaYgISsZAK6uCiiWRs4A4f0ekN0xmJBIgMcfI9RlCiFXLbaCj0Fd1Rzzj_osPoI-Uz2EjzT8VCSFEfl1nd84IaQnxgPTNyX0OkUKkIkiYTgWhyrEq-U_FdF8Zkqfs5EvvRsriNj7PDY%3D)

ICYMI: This week Senator Tim Scott, along with several Republican colleagues in the Senate, released the JUSTICE Act to address needed reforms in our police departments. I admire Senator Scott's leadership and his tireless efforts to put politics aside and strive for meaningful progress. You can read my full statement [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=baff0b4ecc6c4fda9bdea35a4b946b9d&_e=ZK1WX89-hsIA_nEMMkk9qesKiH-m40CViliAL2z0OM8gRC6M0wDdIOPr2yvkz8R5mlOWkukoHLoBM0h-xHg5WGeAXdVZojj-jSE1i6Jm6jo30lT4gvYKbafKbL-ptuu3JOcMDNP14ECekyG-9o9SV8pWOqsI8zShrJIv9YDk28ZY2YHbwswuAMxmkMuDUo9itQTOexQHZncdyiZsX8mAq-odP_QAmXrGPAji83FNWTGJDLNPj3EM2NWS5d23422ulT2YkkE_XRP-_4S5T4azokBl7FxU84O_XS74IhJIQ1dR1CwO95JHsbub9aOPMbOKoDzEp9fCEVn4aAWcKjhaDVqDRhfyTNv6-oMcucMnnyM%3D).

Your continued support is integral to the continued growth of my campaign and I am so glad you are joining me in my fight to flip TX-07 in November.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=baff0b4ecc6c4fda9bdea35a4b946b9d&_e=ZK1WX89-hsIA_nEMMkk9qbPIk-WgfN7DWdr0Ba_49vK3Wo1sNPDsvI_5b_V-KN1MswhXhNwRCA_1mroaECVe8m7t0_lfs-rl03mFShY5S4VrD1j6ytyJF0GD3UB8pF5VZRbrF9R3L4f5sx2V6Tsr0yBnMq-taGH7TS6oqiMFJF_FR4FA3eB56mFNtwaKTV6ZB-vBFL8LTETS8ErfvlTI6tko7vNwjFsSfyG-vIBdmeZt1j8cAWu0bZapSOkc9a_DBFW3oRK48uqs7_3NJL25ybVV-5hPOUwff-pqAYEvckk%3D)****
---

Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=baff0b4ecc6c4fda9bdea35a4b946b9d&_t=_BS4LGjTc5Cos93cUtv00QkdO6QOKLwtgTbJ1UbaLsTZ1kNF99U5iaePTYox-iEEjMpHpmpj7mzXS11D1NoKUt_ue7nUcd7w1sJpUx_2Mn4zEOZSEVFspDN-lCQ2mrpzWBaEKFZw1napeISpa2uqaKVcqY5rOPI6urMnTGzVCXQ%3D).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: ICYMI: 500 Words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Bryant**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | In April 2018, at the suggestion of several supporters, I emailed my first “500 Words”, an update of what I’m doing, reading and thinking about, and said I’d do it again if enough people wanted me to. Scores responded “yes”, so I sent a second, and people asked me to keep ‘em coming. Here’s No. 5 [**You can access previous editions here.**](https://twitter.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c5ac11f23df6ef9dfb9e604c5&id=01fc3b991b&e=ef726ca89e)

This edition is a bit different: it focuses entirely on what I’m thinking.

You are receiving this because at some point you were identified as a supporter, someone who wants to keep in touch, or you asked to be added to the list. If you know somebody who would like to receive this, have them email me at [**billbryantwa@gmail.com**](mailto:billbryantwa@gmail.com). If you want to unsubscribe, please click the unsubscribe link at the bottom.
---
| |
## **WHAT I'M THINKING**
---
| The state has less money because of the COVID-19 lockdown. To deal with the shortfall, the governor has cancelled some raises and asked departments to identify 15% budget cuts. Democratic leaders are proposing new taxes. Some legislators are calling for a special session.

As I watch the unfolding scene, I wish I could call Governor Inslee and offer my thoughts. But as his former opponent, I don’t think he would welcome my call. I’m hoping you will call.

Why now? Because even with reduced revenues, at the end of 2020 the state will still collect over 10% more than it did just four years ago. That balance does not require across-the-board budget cuts, certainly not new taxes. Across-the-board cuts shield our elected officials from the flak that comes with making the hard decisions about what’s important. We elect them to make those decisions and now is the time for them to do it. This fall in revenue provides them the opportunity to reset priorities, update how government delivers services, and make investments that propel our state forward.

Now is not a moment for lazy budget tinkering. Now is the moment to break new ground.

The governor should be exploring how innovation & technology could enable us to deliver better services, faster. He should determine which programs are truly helping people, and not cut them but increase their funding if more funding will provide more help. He should decide which programs and agencies to eliminate.

Let’s put everything on the table.

This is our moment to ask whether Washington needs 298 school districts, each with their own administrative overhead, or whether money spent on redundant administration could be better spent by principals on teachers and students. This is the time to ask whether we need a Department of Ecology and a Department of Natural Resources and a Department of Fish and Wildlife. It is the time to spotlight which funds spent by the Department of Social and Health Services are helping people, and which are feeding a bureaucracy.

This is our moment to invest in projects that provide jobs and strengthen our state now and into the future. We should build a Columbia Science Center in the Tri Cities that, with Battelle, US Department of Energy, Delta High School, colleges and universities, will be our campus for environmental, climate, energy and modular nuclear education and research. We should build a new SR18 four-lane freeway connecting I-90 (North Bend) to I-5 Dupont (south of Fort Lewis), and a third Clark Co. bridge across the Columbia River. We should build water reservoirs in the Cascades. Now is the moment to provide every child with basic medical and dental care, and only fund those homelessness programs proven to lift people off our streets.

This requires an entirely new budget and government.

Legislators cannot reprioritize and restructure government in a special session. That can only be done by a governor who opens the session with a plan he has already built support behind. Imagine, done right, a special session could be our launch pad. The governor needs to hear that with so many people struggling financially, now is not the time for a special session that lunges us backward into more taxes, more bureaucracy.

Now is the time to Break New Ground. #BreakNewGround \- Bill
---

clean_body: | | | | | In April 2018, at the suggestion of several supporters, I emailed my first “500 Words”, an update of what I’m doing, reading and thinking about, and said I’d do it again if enough people wanted me to. Scores responded “yes”, so I sent a second, and people asked me to keep ‘em coming. Here’s No. 5 This edition is a bit different: it focuses entirely on what I’m thinking.

* * *
---
Dear Friend, There are only 111 days between the runoff and November 3rd. We have to hit the ground running on July 15th. We've spent almost three years building the organization we need. We've leveraged all our lessons-learned from 2018. Despite COVID-19, we've never stopped communicating with and listening to people in the district. We've got the data analysis. We've got the experience and the expertise. We've got the positions on issues that will persuade Central Texans. We've got the path to victory in November. We're ready to take on whoever emerges as the Republican nominee - but we need the resources to do so. That's why we need you. We've got two FEC filing deadlines in the next nine days. Every filing is a chance to tell the world that we're building momentum, that we're sending a message. **[Please pitch in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17960764/212596474/-1907457919?refcode=06222020_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmY1OTMyMi04OWI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAcvwQ7b-YOD6qKIj38aeiwVYM1AcySVZ4qxZYlUeog=)**[**. Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to explain why I am supporting Mike Siegel for Congress. [**But if you don’t need any more convincing, and if you’re in a place where you could make a donation right now, he needs our support before his July 14 election. Time is of the essence. Can you chip in to help send Mike Siegel to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17962903/212635730/-1283247144?refcode=em062220&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEyYzEzMC05NmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ya2KfPTXvYO6dVE6yL5y8BnmRJO58QcqJjNzONaQj1k=)
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17962904/212635731/-1283247144?refcode=em062220&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEyYzEzMC05NmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ya2KfPTXvYO6dVE6yL5y8BnmRJO58QcqJjNzONaQj1k=)**
Mike has been fighting for equal opportunity and social justice his entire career. After college, he became a public school teacher, teaching third grade and fifth grade, helping young people learn to read and understand the world. He was a union representative in the teachers union and started free after-school and summer programs that for 15 years have served thousands of low-income children and youth. After spending years in the schools, Mike went to law school so he could take his fighting spirit to the courtroom. Mike challenged racist police policies that targeted Hispanic youth and fought against housing discrimination that left Black and Latino Texans out in the cold. When Mike worked as a city attorney for the City of Austin, he took on Texas Governor Abbott, suing to stop a “show-me-your-papers” bill that Texas Republicans passed to threaten Latino and immigrant communities. Mike also co-wrote the paid sick leave policy for the City of Austin — a critical tool we need to combat the coronavirus pandemic today and help working people build security in the long run. We need Mike’s voice and experience in Congress, where he’ll spend every day fighting for Texans, and I can’t wait to get to work by his side. But Mike is running against one of the wealthiest members of Congress, Michael McCaul. McCaul is practically the poster child of a system rigged to benefit the rich and powerful — he’s spent his tenure in office taking corporate checks and casting votes that help him and his buddies get richer and more powerful. [**We don’t have much time to make sure we retire Michael McCaul and send Mike Siegel to Congress. Help bring him to DC so we can fight side by side for health care for all, an economy that works for everyone, and a climate we can pass on to our children and grandchildren.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17962905/212635732/-1283247144?refcode=em062220&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEyYzEzMC05NmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ya2KfPTXvYO6dVE6yL5y8BnmRJO58QcqJjNzONaQj1k=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17965275/212674435/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzcxMjdjZS1hM2I0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeeT8DSwMl7Zhuajqp5JWYNJgGvqtcxkWe23UbVafuo=)**

| Patriot,
I recently went on [Sean Hannity's show](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MuavfcZyHLvhYu15qRve4-q0SwC9U3WPnJKNxzfQBEWqk5vFvJuBCmgnELJQLFV9ubhRSrWQdU51ilK_sPn_9MqMfjDq7l4nCEKufULJ4CVFob53T2Rnix-yfwoXsefYhBJ1KzyizIB9eS9HG3bbP4KxJqBaZ1u0hQgXN3EDEPQn_kdk_4h33Q==&c=xE2cm9bkEkggDX73jN--FFV25gqlxs032sDnYsYbnXuxUG8pvzuldQ==&ch=gZYZH0Qyvw0v7WX6ctPMiX3CsROZ49S8UERkLnYPvU8jnsrc1AO_tg==) to talk about the dangerous policies that the far-left is proposing for our country.
They want to defund and dismantle police departments across America, leaving innocent people to fend for themselves in the face of violent crime.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Your Guide to Vote Tomorrow
body:
| | Peter, You have the opportunity to make an exponential impact with your vote in the primary election tomorrow Tuesday, June 23. There are important primaries taking place at the federal, state, and local levels in Virginia. Primary elections can feel overwhelming because of how many choices are on the ballot, but your vote is the best opportunity to select the candidates who align with our values. **Here is your simple guide for the Virginia primaries tomorrow:**
1. **Pray and ask the Lord to give you wisdom** as you consider the decisions on your ballot and hold to God’s promise to give wisdom to all who ask of Him (James 1:5).
2. **Use our**[**Voting Assistance Center**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200622_3_states_dbe&n=1) to find all the information you need to vote, specific to Virginia. We’ve got your voter guide info, state resources and more!
3. **Help one other Christian vote in the primary.** Take just a few minutes to email, call, or text another believer and encourage them to vote. Share with them the Voting Assistance Center and remind them why voting is critical in the primaries.

Your vote is not only for yourself; it’s for your family and your community. Galatians 6:10 says, “As you have opportunity, let us do good to all people...” [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200622_3_states_dbe&n=2) **Do Good. Go Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200622_3_states_dbe&n=3)
---
* * *

Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action: There is no “second wave.” Fight the narrative!
body:
| |
---
This week, we need to push back against the narrative forming that there is a “second wave” of the virus coming because a) it’s not true, and b) the left wants to push for lockdowns again and we cannot allow that to happen ever again.
|
---
**Fight the “Second Wave” False Narrative**

**Revise the CDC Guidelines for School Reopening**
[Sign our letter to President Trump](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTc0LWY4YmI3NjBiYjk5YzQwYjNhNjVmYTlkNjQwNDJlOGJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2xuay50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9tLzEvNDkxMDk0ODkvMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0Lzg5LzkyMC8zNTY1ODI4OS1mYTRjLTQ5NjEtOGU5ZC1mZGI0ZjZkYzRkMDE_bWlkPTQyMjM1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Czkc2IhUWuLc65QmxolA1A) about the urgent need to reopen schools and why it’s so important to reopen.
_**Note about sharing links:** We’ve heard from some of you that you are not on any social media and so you can’t share videos and petitions and other items. I just wanted to assure you that if you share links over email to your friends and family, it is just as effective and important as sharing on social media. We are going to make it easier for those of you who are only sharing over email to copy and paste the link into an email. Sometimes we will specifically need a social media post to be shared, and for those action items, if you do not do social media, you can simply copy and paste the link for those posts into an email. At the end of the day, we are just so thankful for whatever actions you are able to take. Thank you!_

Jenny Beth Martin

clean_body: | | This week, we need to push back against the narrative forming that there is a “second wave” of the virus coming because a) it’s not true, and b) the left wants to push for lockdowns again and we cannot allow that to happen ever again. | Fight the “Second Wave” False Narrative Share the audio from the press conference call that we hosted with doctors and the media to push back on the false narrative of a “second wave.” Ways to Share the Press Conference Audio COPY AND PASTE: mailto:?subject=There is no ”second wave.” Fight the narrative!&body=Listen to the press conference call that Tea Party Patriots hosted with doctors and the media to push back on the false narrative of a “second wave.” Share Vice President Pence’s op-ed about how there is not going to be a “second wave.” Ways to Share the Op-ed COPY/PASTE: mailto:?subject=There Isn’t a Coronavirus “Second Wave”&body=In recent days, the media has taken to sounding the alarm bells over a “second wave” of coronavirus infections. Such panic is overblown. Thanks to the leadership of President Trump and the courage and compassion of the American people, our public health system is far stronger than it was four months ago, and we are winning the fight against the invisible enemy. | Stop the Politicization of Hydroxychloroquine Ways to Share the Video COPY AND PASTE: mailto:?subject=Stop the Politicization of Hydroxychloroquine&body=Dr. Simone Gold and Dr. Dan Wohlgelernter discuss the demonization and politicization of Hydroxychloroquine. Studies set up to fail, murder investigations, and more! | Second Opinion Project Website Ways to Share the Website COPY AND PASTE: mailto:?subject=Sign this petition, asking for a second opinion&body=The “experts” in Washington have prescribed a regimen that is destroying lives and livelihoods and it is time for the people to demand a second opinion. Visit the Second Opinion Project website and watch these videos of doctors giving their second opinion. | Revise the CDC Guidelines for School Reopening about the urgent need to reopen schools and why it’s so important to reopen. Note about sharing links: We’ve heard from some of you that you are not on any social media and so you can’t share videos and petitions and other items. I just wanted to assure you that if you share links over email to your friends and family, it is just as effective and important as sharing on social media. We are going to make it easier for those of you who are only sharing over email to copy and paste the link into an email. Sometimes we will specifically need a social media post to be shared, and for those action items, if you do not do social media, you can simply copy and paste the link for those posts into an email. At the end of the day, we are just so thankful for whatever actions you are able to take. Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: Cornyn Watch
subject: 3 terms are enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901b5/7f51f7bc/4ebda9d5/4ef6db56/3711445737/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901b5/7f51f7bc/4ebda9d5/4ef6db55/3711445737/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1ODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-defeatc?refcode=email_20200622.1nd__1584__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

Sen. John Cornyn has been in the Senate for **_3 terms_**. And he's spent every one of those years working for special interests and D.C. bosses like Mitch McConnell -- NOT Texans.

**So when we hear about Sen. Cornyn raking in massive donations from corporate PACs, we 're not surprised.**

He's spent his entire career selling Texans out to special interests. Now, he's getting a super PAC bailout during the hardest election of his life.

That's how Sen. Cornyn thinks politics should work. But with your help, MJ is going to prove him wrong. She's relying on grassroots donations, not special interest money, to power _her_ campaign.

**[We're asking all of our grassroots donors to pitch in $3 -- one dollar for every term Sen. Cornyn has been in the Senate. Can we count on you today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901b5/7f51f7bc/4ebda9d5/4ef6db54/3711445737/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1ODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-defeatc?refcode=email_20200622.1nd__1584__&amount=3")**

**If we beat Sen. Cornyn, we flip the Senate. That 's the goal. Every second (and every dollar) counts.**
**[Donate $3 to retire Sen. Cornyn](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901b5/7f51f7bc/4ebda9d5/4ef6db54/3711445737/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1ODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-defeatc?refcode=email_20200622.1nd__1584__&amount=3")**
\-- Team MJ

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Join me to build a people-first future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People First Future
body:
I’m proud to support People First Future as they work to elect great candidates across the country fighting for change.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17967774/212723205/-1445340428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2ZhNjgzMS1iNmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmXzd2GdlMlv5jNcND0CTCJ3PkW3-owGhamtX9NZBOY=&emci=ad320af3-aeb4-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=73fa6831-b6b4-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1262380)
Team, will you help build a people-first future?
Julián and I have long fought for the same thing: **big, structural change that puts people first.**
So I'm proud to support People First Future as they work to elect great candidates across the country fighting for change. From city hall to the halls of Congress, People First Future is investing in the next generation of **bold, progressive leaders.**
But those leaders won't be able to bring about big, structural change unless we help them win. **[If you're in a place to make a contribution, will you join me in supporting People First Future as they work to elect these great candidates?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17967788/212723219/69314299?refcode=em20200622-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2ZhNjgzMS1iNmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmXzd2GdlMlv5jNcND0CTCJ3PkW3-owGhamtX9NZBOY=)**
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17967789/212723220/69314299?refcode=em20200622-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2ZhNjgzMS1iNmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmXzd2GdlMlv5jNcND0CTCJ3PkW3-owGhamtX9NZBOY=)
Now, I'll just be blunt — some cynical pundits would write off our chances to win some of these races. That's because these progressive candidates are up against the power and influence of of corporate PACs, lobbyists, and wealthy special interests.
But we don't get what we don't fight for, and we have something stronger and more powerful than all of their money and influence combined: Grassroots supporters like YOU. We have _the people_ behind our vision.
Julián and the People First Future team are working hard every day to build a grassroots movement that will overcome special interest influence and elect great candidates **up and down the ballot.** If we fight together, if we persist together, we can win together.
**[Please join me and Julián as we work to elect these people-first candidates fighting for big, structural change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17967790/212723221/69314299?refcode=em20200622-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2ZhNjgzMS1iNmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmXzd2GdlMlv5jNcND0CTCJ3PkW3-owGhamtX9NZBOY=)**
Together, we will build a nation where everyone counts.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17967791/212723222/69314299?refcode=em20200622-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2ZhNjgzMS1iNmI0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmXzd2GdlMlv5jNcND0CTCJ3PkW3-owGhamtX9NZBOY=)

name: NH Beer Caucus
subject: TONIGHT: You're invited to the Fifth Beer Caucus Happy Hour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
body:
| |
---
Derek, please join us as we chat with two contenders for the Republican nomination for a New Hampshire Congressional seat!
[Lynne Blankenbeker](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzA0MTEzODMyNTMxNTQ2JmM9djBlOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMDIxNjImZD1kOHc3Zjdq.4NtbeP1dcD_vaKVrf_etIFBer5GPY5ALmc9A-Dqu27Q) and [Steve Negron](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzA0MTEzODMyNTMxNTQ2JmM9djBlOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMDIxNjYmZD14MmQzajRo.FA1-4VrkjsUIK5mQWcKl8JJiOL0-yZJgue6pDElOUr0) are hoping to replace Democrat Anne Kuster in the New Hampshire's Congressional District 2 and will virtually meet face to face on Monday evening, June 22 when they join the founders of the Legislative Beer Caucus. We will have a casual conversation over libations, talking about Current Events, politics (of course) and whatever else might come up. The ‘Chat' section will be open for you to post your questions, and if time and discussion allow, we will work them into the conversation.
This is the latest is a series of Beer Caucus “Happy Hours” where members chat with public figures over libations about various contemporary issues. Earlier sessions have included senate candidates, Matt Mowers, Matt Mayberry, Don Bolduc and Cork Messner, National GOP Committeeman Chris Ager, Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse, and House Republican leader Dick Hinch, among others.
**Sneak Peak: The Next event is already slated for July 7th at 730p, and will feature Governor Chris Sununu! Mark your calendars. We will post the details and links to that event, at the end of Lynne and Steve’s discussion.**
Contact Rep Lang if you have questions or concerns.

Sincerely,
Rep Tim Lang - (R-Sanbornton) cell [603-566-9802](tel:603-566-9802) for any questions.
Rep Reed Panasiti - (R - Amherst)
Rep Howard Pearl - (R - Loudon)
Hon Michael Moffett - (R- Loudon)
**
****Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
New Hampshire 03301 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.
---
[ Unsubscribe ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzA0MTEzODMyNTMxNTQ2JmM9djBlOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMDI5MzgmZD13MncwYzZ2.ETWIz9heEYyZ6bZJZJa7xMOzZ5qJ09qfuOI7OWi4-dY)

Will you chip in to help us in these crucial final hours of the campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuU5D8dWGpzTxdPjNGw2qr6bQ-8Or367LckcZ4wR_tEgzJhmYtC0s69qOYiuILIHHyrMfgo8nZ5E2NatraU9klCeW80GJZeyMtRHTkcM6KuPoo_ThGjJG3TIkQ3s6hL3b_D1tqukvcvK3k-TM1mDfM666uqca6DBsbER8oIAXCe0qv3ztgmngZe3rysgEYTDW13tPTZEvmw2DuQVFFytZFjvU9cfEHpVBj6WzznHkK0R2gaBEzpYIePToNH1XujxhAtdEzzL3TGUS5ET7q6b9K/32u/BvEu1C9gSOSNFaNakf2ubg/h2/D5-gVLqBqFEt_HdhKoy1Oj7cN80M__ZhtxCjZutFYsQ)_**

We know we’ve asked for a lot this campaign, but we are asking one final time before Election Day. We’ve built an incredible grassroots movement and the polls show Mondaire in the lead, but we can’t let up now. We are up against the son of a pharmaceutical billionaire who has now spent almost $5 million on his campaign. We don’t have that kind of money, but thankfully we do have a movement that money cannot buy. Now, let’s win! Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

body:

Peter -- as a loyal supporter, I wanted to give you a personal update on my campaign.
The most critical deadline of my race to date is only **2 days away.** June 24th marks my pre-primary deadline -- my campaign's final shot at reaching our fundraising goals before the primary election. And today, **we are BEHIND and we are being OUTRAISED.**
That is why I must ask you this: [**Can I count on you to chip in just $5, $10, or $25 to my campaign today? Any amount makes a huge difference in our effort to catch up to my opponent 's massive fundraising numbers. Your support today can change this race.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3ODM4MjMS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTkwMjIzMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
My opponent has outraised us every single month of 2020. With Chuck Schumer's help, Far Left billionaires from across the country have funneled unprecedented sums of money into Maine.
They have shamelessly spread false attacks about my record, attacks that I am fighting against every single day. Maine is not only the most expensive senate race in the country,_it has become the most contentious._
**Please consider donating to my campaign before my pre-primary deadline!**
[DONATE $25](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3ODM4MjMS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTkwMjIzMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you for all your support,
Susan Collins

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Dr. Alveda King: Trump Is Moving the Nation Toward Police Reform and Racial Justice
body:
“In his ‘I Have a Dream’ address of August 1963, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. called for an end to the scourge of racism in the United States" | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54e5a034f8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Dr. Alveda King: Trump Is Moving the Nation Toward Police Reform and Racial Justice**

“In his ‘I Have a Dream’ address of August 1963, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. called for an end to the scourge of racism in the United States,” writes King’s niece, Dr. Alveda King, in the _Washington Examiner_.

“As President Trump works toward building a more perfect union, America can dream again. Immediately after Floyd's brutal death, Trump made clear that he is fully committed to ensuring justice will be served for George and his family—that he will not have died on that gray pavement in vain.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8aa938ddb1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Chicago saw its highest number of gun violence victims in a single weekend this year with 102 people shot across the city from Friday evening to Monday morning, 14 of them fatally. Five of those killed were minors,” the [_Chicago Sun-Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=858d287e8f&e=3ee4985eea) reports.

President Trump has opposed calls from the left to defund U.S. police departments.
---
|
---
| “The Labor Department on Friday reported jobless rates in May for the 50 states, and the news is the greater than usual variation. Some state economies are recovering much faster than others, and the worst performing tend to be those that have imposed the most severe lockdowns,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3759e7237d&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| President Trump will visit Yuma, Arizona, tomorrow to mark completion for the 200th mile of border wall system between the United States and Mexico. “Trump will tour the border wall and thank U.S. Border Patrol and law enforcement for their efforts,” [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee9617961a&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5ceeb7c5a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ac2dcbb5a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8b1a900845)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Hello all! Please find the details for connecting to tonight's zoom below:
When: Jun 22, 2020 08:00 PM
Where: [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcqd-2qrjooGtEKUPwizeTnC09LTvuxRBp5](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzM1MzM5NzIxMTY4MjQzJmM9aTRsNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMjU3ODYmZD1sM2o5ZzV3.IiBBl-JxEktA2LJt5s3NYtP3QX1WRRBEwqqH-NHAYHY)
Who: [Lynne Blankenbeker](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzM1MzM5NzIxMTY4MjQzJmM9aTRsNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMjU3ODgmZD1hOGk2bzJp.n4tE_ZnjFKRutu2WPzNisI8EEvwFokaLXPKLgHMUIns) and [Steve Negron](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzM1MzM5NzIxMTY4MjQzJmM9aTRsNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMjU3OTAmZD1sNXUyYzV5.C1e7r4sUD0-KGfHZ5Ej2wmq_CkM8AiLFPVQXlSVmXuE)

Derek, please join us as we chat with two contenders for the Republican nomination for a New Hampshire Congressional seat!
[Lynne Blankenbeker](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzM1MzM5NzIxMTY4MjQzJmM9aTRsNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMjU3OTImZD15MGwxcDls.kIzx62fCRHsq9f9mxLBJCNMauWu5jZANnQ349xuPSE8) and [Steve Negron](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ5MzM1MzM5NzIxMTY4MjQzJmM9aTRsNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjEzMjU3OTQmZD16MnEzbzhv.qEJgYRBWQP8T7M_E3JQFJFrCsAcOTq4ftPhQl_1Ph1E) are hoping to replace Democrat Anne Kuster in the New Hampshire's Congressional District 2 and will virtually meet face to face on Monday evening, June 22 when they join the founders of the Legislative Beer Caucus. We will have a casual conversation over libations, talking about Current Events, politics (of course) and whatever else might come up. The ‘Chat' section will be open for you to post your questions, and if time and discussion allow, we will work them into the conversation.
This is the latest is a series of Beer Caucus “Happy Hours” where members chat with public figures over libations about various contemporary issues. Earlier sessions have included senate candidates, Matt Mowers, Matt Mayberry, Don Bolduc and Cork Messner, National GOP Committeeman Chris Ager, Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse, and House Republican leader Dick Hinch, among others.
**Sneak Peak: The Next event is already slated for July 7th at 730p, and will feature Governor Chris Sununu! Mark your calendars. We will post the details and links to that event, at the end of Lynne and Steve’s discussion.**
Contact Rep Lang if you have questions or concerns.

Sincerely,
Rep Tim Lang - (R-Sanbornton) cell [603-566-9802](tel:603-566-9802) for any questions.
Rep Reed Panasiti - (R - Amherst)
Rep Howard Pearl - (R - Loudon)
Hon Michael Moffett - (R- Loudon)
**
****Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
New Hampshire 03301 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.
---

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: TOMORROW – Make your plan to vote today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, The critical _**primary and special elections for New York 's 27th Congressional district are tomorrow**_, and we need to make sure that **every single Republican voter is ready to GET OUT AND VOTE!** _**Make your plan to vote today, find your polling place, and remind your friends and family members to vote as well**_ - every single vote matters! [To find your polling place click here](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/lRlZQYkhpE4CczSe17EP9w/HT1IaV892jjBWkSPVywHmYQA) **If you have trouble at the polls tomorrow call 716-800-2987** I entered this race over a year ago because I wanted to restore integrity to this seat, and bring strong, conservative, and experienced leadership to Western New York. Nancy Pelosi and her hand-picked candidate, Nate McMurray, are actively working against our values, against our President, and against our Country. **We cannot let this seat fall into the hands of a radical socialist like Nate - a man who has called supporters of our great President "traitors."** That's why these elections tomorrow are critical, and that is why we need to make sure that every single Republican in NY27 makes their voice heard! **Together, let 's give this district the representation it deserves, and let's give our President a strong ally.** I'm proud to be the only candidate to have his endorsement - and unlike Nancy, Nate, and AOC - _**I 'll proudly fight alongside President Trump.**_ _**Once again I urge you to come out and vote tomorrow! I humbly ask for your support in both the special and primary elections.**_ Thank you for your continued support - **now let 's win this!** Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/7CSewckrRmHNEl9skEZp763g/HT1IaV892jjBWkSPVywHmYQA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/jQNLcNpHTBEhUduEbtMfoA/HT1IaV892jjBWkSPVywHmYQA)
* * *
5501 Camp Road
P.O. Box 893

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christianna=20Dyer?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/406524774370/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, Team Dani! I hope everyone had a nice holiday yesterday! We will be hosting an exciting event for our wonderful volunteer team:**Zoom chat with Dani on Tuesday, July 14th at 6 pm!** Save the date and be there! We’ll send out the zoom link closer to the day.
Take a look at the progress from this week:
* **NEW GOAL!** We are trying to fill Soldier Field with voters we called by the end of the summer! So far we’re off to a strong start! You were able to connect with **5,981** people in the 16th district on the phone this week.

Let’s keep up the good work these next few days!
* **MVP of the week** award goes to: Frankie A. who made more than **900** of those calls!
* **Some things to look forward to: **
* Get excited for a**VIRTUAL PRIDE EVENT**!!!: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/danipride](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5d8a19aa5e&e=140a9b81e7)
* Join us for an epic night of performances, demonstrations, and Pride fun!

A few reminders:
* **ITS SUMMER & ITS TIME TO PARTY!:** If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, and all you need to do is sit back with your happy hour drink of choice and invite your friends to do the same!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking,**CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!
* If you have new tips to share as part of our Volunteer Voice column, send them my way!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Dave K.
1. _I look at being hung up on as a timing issue; not a personal affront to me. It is analogous to being cut off when driving. _
1. _I try not to become angry since I don't know the circumstance that the caller is in at the moment I called._
2. _Perhaps the caller has a child in need or someone important is on the other line waiting to speak to that person or whatever life threw at them at that moment._
3. _For several people, it is a VERY challenging time and their minds are not on the election yet. I understand and appreciate that._
4. _I automatically and happily put them into the call back file so that they will be called closer to the time of the election. Hopefully, they will be in a better place by then and receptive to my polite conversation._

---
| Christianna Dyer
---

body:
In a little over a week, our campaign is facing a critical FEC fundraising deadline. At that point in time, our fundraising numbers will become public and everyone -- the media, political pundits, and the special interest groups backing our opponent -- will be able to see where we stand as a campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17969658/212769167/460726911?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.22_b1_rfcm_all-nd&refcode2=3e7952a9-c7b4-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTc5NTJhOS1jN2I0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqVd0eRtL_4-me1DHc9gALUduI9-JwO72Esahs-dNnk=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Team,

I’m reaching out to [**ask you to contribute $10 (_for PA-10!_) to help flip this seat blue and send Eugene to Congress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17969659/212769168/460726911?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.22_b1_rfcm_all-nd&refcode2=3e7952a9-c7b4-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTc5NTJhOS1jN2I0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqVd0eRtL_4-me1DHc9gALUduI9-JwO72Esahs-dNnk=), but first I’d like to explain why.

In a little over a week, our campaign is facing a critical FEC fundraising deadline. At that point in time, our fundraising numbers will become public and everyone -- the media, political pundits, and the special interest groups backing our opponent -- will be able to see where we stand as a campaign.

Since grassroots contributions are the building blocks of our campaign, we’re counting on these [**$10 contributions**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17969660/212769169/-1784475102?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.22_b1_rfcm_all-nd&refcode2=3e7952a9-c7b4-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTc5NTJhOS1jN2I0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqVd0eRtL_4-me1DHc9gALUduI9-JwO72Esahs-dNnk=) from people like you to have a strong showing when our fundraising numbers become public.

**And, friend, if everyone who reads this email chipped in just $10, I have no doubt that we’d be in a strong position as we head into these critical final days before our deadline.

name: Darin LaHood
subject: I’m fighting alongside Esther Joy King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
She’s a small business owner, a lawyer, and a Captain in the Army Reserve. Will you chip in to help her represent our neighbors in the 17th District? [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=99e23a01363a481c99b30c4ea818f5a0&_e=BbapucdV4gBVX4Bqvl6ieogpqEFz8zqy9ztQmUvMp_wjI-K96GMlq-kY2zK1i4_27YIulmHh0ww3QH4fDDmODAYVpWAqbZWz1aOmyRIUn_RlWof8iar-1zGt790jESrPOg9VxSF3tvDJwbhlQJdVT8bvYOaVl7l7MLlQbTqJjxGn2eAqenDInfBD2Sg-xfujz3QA9JvFhPXvSmxdb02idx0TJh63N-msPjSs9m-HaZd6TcFh4wdBN2mCF5kbk0rsdJKku0XCP5sL3WscgqeTSilbn02gFMZTNuSdrE_8q4GlXy2l4Z8pHPODnjnLsW9_IA8PJXED9M3hxb4jd4jkL2QjnYtlw7rFQVdox1uKKUn5QT9F5QVeYXHm8PHMqyH6-dv_iYw5tspotBXbd9iAG6Q6Augfg5bDD_Bpx8Ui638aNrlWbGdz6jB9B2cWyr8dbcN6s2_NzWO2n7zA2JmNqiwrJC94_6OhKtbBf8A90UA%3D) | |
---
Friend,

_Something big is happening right down the road..._

**Esther Joy King** – a political outsider – is shaking up her congressional race in the 17th District and could play a major role in flipping the house this November.

If you’ve never been introduced to Esther, **she’s exactly the type of person we need in Washington** to make big decisions for Illinois.
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=99e23a01363a481c99b30c4ea818f5a0&_e=BbapucdV4gBVX4Bqvl6ieogpqEFz8zqy9ztQmUvMp_wjI-K96GMlq-kY2zK1i4_27YIulmHh0ww3QH4fDDmODAYVpWAqbZWz1aOmyRIUn_RlWof8iar-1zGt790jESrPOg9VxSF3tvDJwbhlQJdVT8bvYOaVl7l7MLlQbTqJjxGn2eAqenDInfBD2Sg-xfujz3QA9JvFhPXvSmxdb02idx0TJh63N-msPjSs9m-HaZd6TcFh4wdBN2mCF5kbk0rsdJKku0XCP5sL3WscgqeTSqSn_WSqpnRYDh3FYBvd1kXmnRDgC7nTEUhtimtT-qeGEUqMQNsdN4x8FMpEP3IIRvPVRgTicHLXhaBlM5DYNdhmnz8FDxgoUE_ALeG-C9cA4qtHzZ3bHmObMJ15Up1RcPAEmFrzPppF-plSkW8m2pItzA3nksBNrMvqyBVv17ZxHCLCrhIvyreLiq8nBYOe6JWQvf1XorwbMs4kFK93PvY%3D)
_She’s a successful lawyer._
_She’s a small business owner._
_She’s a Captain in the Army Reserve._
**_Esther is more than qualified for this job._**

Friend, can I count on you to give Esther the support she needs to deliver her experience and leadership to Capitol Hill?
[**CHIP IN TO HELP ESTHER TAKE BACK HER DISTRICT**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=99e23a01363a481c99b30c4ea818f5a0&_e=BbapucdV4gBVX4Bqvl6ieogpqEFz8zqy9ztQmUvMp_wjI-K96GMlq-kY2zK1i4_27YIulmHh0ww3QH4fDDmODAYVpWAqbZWz1aOmyRIUn_RlWof8iar-1zGt790jESrPOg9VxSF3tvDJwbhlQJdVT8bvYOaVl7l7MLlQbTqJjxGn2eAqenDInfBD2Sg-xfujz3QA9JvFhPXvSmxdb02idx0TJh63N-msPjSs9m-HaZd6TcFh4wdBN2mCF5kbk0rsdJKku0XCP5sL3WscgqeTSnrBRWrfvvu515AbzDzBARDvFbGPvqxeTwH0lOEtUm6JvvsHWSbuebI_OTuj15XWm0pj7I1YZ4SHwjYmTubeYwm1pbi5chqOBULhEXnfcIoQGiIzhWvRQ7rxzi94WAlX1bNLdrKLdZv_XaHlxdCNbl84M7dWAlHAJrWJ_1eEPlVqgSSYPOxRDJrrcvzqa-AInmYv8qSFqOn17nsF_Q4zcSw%3D)
**Esther is a true servant leader.**

Growing up, she learned what it meant to serve from her parents who were missionaries on the US-Mexico border. They didn’t have much to call their own, but that never stopped them from showing generosity to those they encountered.

**Upon graduating from college, she took the path less traveled.**

Instead of jumping right into what many would call the “real world,” Esther served as an aid worker in Kabul, Afghanistan. She developed a passion for defending democracy and protecting human rights, beliefs that are core to the leader she is today.

**Esther has continued to serve her community in any way she can.**

Whether she was creating jobs through her small marketing business, fighting for economic development in her legal career, or serving her country as a Captain in the Army Reserve, **Esther has always found a way to give back.**

**Will you donate below to help us take the House back together?**
[**CHIP IN TO HELP ESTHER TAKE BACK HER DISTRICT**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=99e23a01363a481c99b30c4ea818f5a0&_e=BbapucdV4gBVX4Bqvl6ieogpqEFz8zqy9ztQmUvMp_wjI-K96GMlq-kY2zK1i4_27YIulmHh0ww3QH4fDDmODAYVpWAqbZWz1aOmyRIUn_RlWof8iar-1zGt790jESrPOg9VxSF3tvDJwbhlQJdVT8bvYOaVl7l7MLlQbTqJjxGn2eAqenDInfBD2Sg-xfujz3QA9JvFhPXvSmxdb02idx0TJh63N-msPjSs9m-HaZd6TcFh4wdBN2mCF5kbk0rsdJKku0XCP5sL3WscgqeTSt7YVKNKNvxPwu1gRVMNexYuSNXvkzZtYAPHGIkS-K2oee2ITKUnG8733q71y34wUDFWtWnDurWtmIngMSkZNv5MwLXDhDQCBHekFZzthIootiX3Bvr9KifgbZNKcbVNJa8VZ2OGwPpQu56hgVUPlKikcaaFUMmQQs2ima5nYhMW4w4GY4bP6MV_H8mJvz3DiOUijsTyA2rPETqQtHMOyqw%3D)
Flipping the 17th District from blue to red won’t be an easy task – but with your help, we can give Esther the support she needs to make it happen. She’s the right woman for the job and embodies what servant leadership is all about.

**[That’s why I jumped at the opportunity when she reached out and asked if we could give her a boost. I want to serve right alongside Esther in Congress, but we need your help. Will you chip in and split your donation 50/50 between our campaigns?](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=99e23a01363a481c99b30c4ea818f5a0&_e=BbapucdV4gBVX4Bqvl6ieogpqEFz8zqy9ztQmUvMp_wjI-K96GMlq-kY2zK1i4_27YIulmHh0ww3QH4fDDmODAYVpWAqbZWz1aOmyRIUn_RlWof8iar-1zGt790jESrPOg9VxSF3tvDJwbhlQJdVT8bvYOaVl7l7MLlQbTqJjxGn2eAqenDInfBD2Sg-xfujz3QA9JvFhPXvSmxdb02idx0TJh63N-msPjSs9m-HaZd6TcFh4wdBN2mCF5kbk0rsdJKku0XCP5sL3WscgqeTSsGO_6uO81bOUh1UI4PhCcyJSkxPBzmzxzyNPw4LRgHeHeFzm-z30YHNIdnplUIJW-TbabF3BF6AERuOU_KHFLM4LE-s9Y7nQqg4Yuv8-E9yh5FRQ1OvVQERLNN65ky5Tm07MZ0wdoiTVd88sZJeUQGen2CF_i7KFRy6CDpWZzuUQ4-OQTU2Rlnq3mAL6sGE3Zob8C0tXF5bhTbtwE3y3JU%3D)**

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

clean_body: Friends, My team reached out last week to ask if you’d stand with my efforts to reopen schools in Indiana, but I haven’t seen your name on the list yet. Getting our students back to school will make sure our children are prepared for the future and will help get the rest of the country back on track - and President Trump agrees! Friend, if you believe it’s time to reopen our schools to make sure this generation does not get left behind, then Thank you, Jim Banks PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We all know the stakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter Last Monday, I hosted a staff retreat for our campaign team. Thanks to technology, it was productive and fun, complete with digital breakout rooms! One of the questions I posed to our team was: Describe our campaign in three words.

The winning words were: **[strong, earnest, fearless.](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)**

This November, Americans will vote in the most critical presidential election in our nation's history, and in the months ahead, those of us who flipped seats that Trump won will put every ounce of our energy into ensuring that we not only hold the House majority, but also restore decency to the White House.

These last few months have cast terrifying clarity on the cracks in our society.

Our country is facing a global health crisis; more than 115,000 Americans have died and each day more families feel the pain of loss. We need **[strong leadership](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)** , and we need **[earnest commitment](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)** to our health care system.

These last few weeks, the unjust deaths of Black Americans have laid bare the underlying systemic racism that our country needs to address. As we collectively work towards a more just and equitable future for Black Americans, we need sound leadership. In order to forge meaningful solutions, we need **[leaders who will listen](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)** to those who are unheard, **[leaders who will build broad coalitions](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)** to bring people together, and leaders who are not afraid to **[challenge the way"things have always been done.](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)"**

And lastly, as the economic downturn accompanying our global pandemic threatens many families with unemployment and not enough food on the table, urgent solutions are needed for these Americans who are struggling. Small businesses and families in Central Virginia need support that is timely and transparent, and we need **[leaders with the grit and persistence to fight for this aid.](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)**

This is the most important election of our lifetime, and while I know that **[I will put every ounce of my energy](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)** into this election, and my amazing team will join me in **[running a strong, earnest, and fearless campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)** , we need your help.

**[Will you join us?](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)** Every time someone like you makes a grassroots donation, makes a phone call, or sends a volunteer text, it paves the way for a brighter future on Election Day.

Peter, with so much on the line this November, can you please consider a contribution to my re-election?
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

_Abigail_

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
3rd Floor
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/gI6dCKT0RDTAuGn55-7TnVUb95UoVkmpwjHDQUytPlo=).
| [DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/EfpDqET7-2n8rA_-iqdAt0n-KqeVd6YURdJEMqX8kKw=/g34uVPaMnuItnB1aBHbSuIsn4lBdjFQTnPoegSpaT1E=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200622-1-EM&amount=25)

body:
There's a lot of work to be done if we're going to change this country for the better. The fairer, more just future we envision _is_ possible, but we'll need people in Congress who know how to _get things done. _
Linda has a progressive track record that dates back to her days as a labor lawyer. Time and again, she has put the working people of Southern California first -- and she has no plans to stop now.

Mike has been fighting for equal opportunity and social justice his entire career. After college, he became a public school teacher, teaching third grade and fifth grade, helping young people learn to read and understand the world. He was a union representative in the teachers union and started free after-school and summer programs that for 15 years have served thousands of low-income children and youth. After spending years in the schools, Mike went to law school so he could take his fighting spirit to the courtroom. Mike challenged racist police policies that targeted Hispanic youth and fought against housing discrimination that left Black and Latino Texans out in the cold. When Mike worked as a city attorney for the City of Austin, he took on Texas Governor Abbott, suing to stop a “show-me-your-papers” bill that Texas Republicans passed to threaten Latino and immigrant communities. Mike also co-wrote the paid sick leave policy for the City of Austin — a critical tool we need to combat the coronavirus pandemic today and help working people build security in the long run. We need Mike’s voice and experience in Congress, where he’ll spend every day fighting for Texans, and I can’t wait to get to work by his side. But Mike is running against one of the wealthiest members of Congress, Michael McCaul. McCaul is practically the poster child of a system rigged to benefit the rich and powerful — he’s spent his tenure in office taking corporate checks and casting votes that help him and his buddies get richer and more powerful. [**We don’t have much time to make sure we retire Michael McCaul and send Mike Siegel to Congress. name: Pragya Nandini
subject: We want to expand our digital program
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RMpnJWIZgOkLiY49B5lrc7dfdCFq2u9cBrg_spKhR-g=/AF9cOk_LPOpASTWGMjWq5nK-dZ0dO2UxT6uNpXL5C-s=)

Peter,

I know our campaign team has been asking a lot. I know times are hard and life is stressful, and we can't overstate how much we appreciate your tireless help and support.

But I have one last ask to make: We're trying to add one last piece to our digital program, and **we 're $3,000 short** of being able to do it.

That final $3,000 will let us expand our digital buy to ensure that every last voter who goes to the polls will see Adem's message one last time before they vote. It will let us make sure that voters from Park Slope to Brownsville know that Adem is the only person who can deliver housing for all, justice for all, and healthcare for all. Plus, he's the only candidate in the race endorsed by _The New York Times._

This is going to be a tight race, and I wouldn't be asking you to pitch in one last time if we didn't think this was make-or-break.

**[If 10 people give $300 or if 100 people give $30, we're all set. Will you chip in one last time to help out?](https://act.myngp.com/el/RMpnJWIZgOkLiY49B5lrc7dfdCFq2u9cBrg_spKhR-g=/X0BLxjublce-sYxrFJ2I9UVb6BtmTDPLLtS0g78-KBQ=)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[COUNT ME IN FOR $300](https://act.myngp.com/el/RMpnJWIZgOkLiY49B5lrc7dfdCFq2u9cBrg_spKhR-g=/X0BLxjublce-sYxrFJ2I9UVb6BtmTDPLLtS0g78-KBQ=?express_lane=true&amount=300&refcode=express_lane_300)******
******[COUNT ME IN FOR $30](https://act.myngp.com/el/RMpnJWIZgOkLiY49B5lrc7dfdCFq2u9cBrg_spKhR-g=/X0BLxjublce-sYxrFJ2I9UVb6BtmTDPLLtS0g78-KBQ=?express_lane=true&amount=30&refcode=express_lane_30)******
******[COUNT ME IN FOR ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.myngp.com/el/RMpnJWIZgOkLiY49B5lrc7dfdCFq2u9cBrg_spKhR-g=/X0BLxjublce-sYxrFJ2I9UVb6BtmTDPLLtS0g78-KBQ=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other)******

Thank you for everything. Let's finish this race strong, the same way we started it: as a team.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Proud to Stand with Lisa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
We’ve all been hearing about a candidate in Pennsylvania who is on a roll. She’s strong on the issues and is ready to stand up for America........... Peter, We’ve all been hearing about a candidate in Pennsylvania who is on a roll.
She’s **strong** on the issues and is ready to stand up for America.
She’s promised to cut wasteful spending, lower taxes, and bring jobs BACK to the Lehigh Valley.
She supports term-limits and has already committed to term-limiting herself – making sure government works for the people, not the other way around.
She stands with our president to strengthen our economy, protect the rule of law, and defend American values.
Peter, that’s why I’m proud today to announce my endorsement of Lisa Scheller for Congress – someone who will never forget who she works for when she goes to Washington -- the people of Pennsylvania. Someone who is committed to putting **YOU** above partisan politics. [**STAND WITH LISA SCHELLER**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=42b838072bdb4120b6fbdc24cddcde61&_e=xK6WxJgT89I15iDc-NDNrUuHH7ismVXo3ZvtbWEaV5-qfVN4mjlsAFAGO6igxOVKLwm-IiSXm1qzAUQzWNmJ7xiXc7yiWJZJwbbYjEqPG_ImQZWzA19FB5zxG6Rzkq9fFX6TO6NHPERqPMTJPhbZlcVMGQJYSzgV30IrViDx31qrrezbkWfGJoPIIgihLLGFvruhz9CtJ42hu9t7Ec1SUVVSSv6efnRbJ5hmvOETpbnzTp6ZKVq7dqhyHJi_Du5BMi9mh4eyPyHDgUSc588pLLQMuB_nhJ_UinUXB97SRerw-31cICiGQZAGqkS-ePEFYrC3kxYiX8KUrWQekYvG-XBkGTAvD0Rc4c9z7zSM3lfmQy-619VFS_deBFlrDigXcGiWuGq07sDBomxQ2cd3gxP-XR9VniPH_S5lp_s-amDdZ9QUk1D395YuTYDA7lCdPwFAEVwDWFoODXb2E0TmmvfdGUAcWFxUsHCWKC81fP4%3D) But Peter, Lisa has a tough race ahead these next few months. She needs YOU.
This is a MAJOR state for the Democrats who have had their eyes on Pennsylvania for years, and that’s why it is so important that we do all that we can to make sure we win PA-07 this November.
**[Peter, will you join Lisa immediately to ensure that we protect PA-07 and the values that make this the greatest country in the world?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=42b838072bdb4120b6fbdc24cddcde61&_e=xK6WxJgT89I15iDc-NDNrUuHH7ismVXo3ZvtbWEaV5-qfVN4mjlsAFAGO6igxOVKLwm-IiSXm1qzAUQzWNmJ7xiXc7yiWJZJwbbYjEqPG_ImQZWzA19FB5zxG6Rzkq9fFX6TO6NHPERqPMTJPhbZlcVMGQJYSzgV30IrViDx31qrrezbkWfGJoPIIgihLLGFvruhz9CtJ42hu9t7Ec1SUVVSSv6efnRbJ5hmvOETpbnzTp6ZKVq7dqhyHJi_Du5BBzmxUf_5aBy1iiHK97k0HmmGw-vsd3q8wR9A0Qyi2WRqIb8nN8RHRvCBJPLQid6J4XpwNq8wRAoWhQ_vjMGfsVU_E-ySeQM5LGtCh6nKAVSqJyk432z2iCURbac-Aw0qRMaUZ644myCTaD7EMa2Q3_iMa-UDlf9DQeLiJJjR5ikl0LXSc4KJGlNYYx9Dj886Q5xGFRYBxVHWK9p2-grSmBZUbxHCl8jNucHA6amf5GM%3D)**
Will you chip in and stand with Lisa Scheller?
PA-07 deserves to be represented by someone who will put you first. Lisa Scheller is that person.
My very best, Nikki Haley Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Doing what we can, with what we have, where we are
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42607?refcode=ema20200622-94858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=94858%2E444211%2ED6d-9B ]I hope that you can help us with a contribution right now. We are
having tremendous success in voter outreach in Texas, but I need your help
to keep it going.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42607?refcode=ema20200622-94858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=94858%2E444211%2ED6d-9B ]Contribute

As I have shared with you in previous emails, our volunteers are making a
record number of voter registration and voter contact phone calls, and the
rate of participation is steadily increasing. For example, the first night
we held a voter registration phone bank, just over 250 volunteers showed
up (virtually, we conduct these phone banks over Zoom).

The next night it was 368. The following night, 523. By the last night of
our voter registration phone bank, 822 people were making phone calls
throughout Texas helping to register Democratic voters.

Ultimately all of those volunteers on all of those phone banks made over
600,000 phone calls to help add net-new voters to the rolls as we seek to
win a Democratic majority in the state house and help Joe Biden become the
first Democrat to win Texas since 1976.

And we’re about to start a new effort, contacting existing voters to get
them to commit to voting for Democrats up and down the ballot. We will
then share that information in the state-wide voter file that Democratic
candidates up and down the ballot can use to give them a competitive edge.
I expect that given the amazing turnout we’ve had for our voter
registration effort so far, that we’ll be successful in reaching hundreds
of thousands of voters in competitive districts throughout Texas.

All of that is good news, and frankly, is far better than I thought we’d
be doing at this point, especially considering that our original plan was
to be out canvassing in person by now. Because the pandemic limited our
ability to physically be with voters, we had to adapt and improvise.

As Teddy Roosevelt said, “Do what you can, with what you have, where you
are.”

That’s us. Using Zoom, dialing software and an army of volunteers to reach
existing voters and register new ones.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42607?refcode=ema20200622-94858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=94858%2E444211%2ED6d-9B ]I hope that you will continue to support our work by donating today.
Your contribution will fund a small paid team that recruits volunteers and
organizes these outreach efforts as well as the licensing of the dialer
software and the other systems that support what is today the largest
voter registration and voter contact effort taking place in the state of
Texas.

I’m grateful to have your help and promise you that I will make the most
of it.

Sincerely,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42607?refcode=ema20200622-94858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=94858%2E444211%2ED6d-9B ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=94858%2E444211%2ED6d-9B

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Tiffany
subject: President Trump Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
**Welcome Back President Trump** Friends, President Trump returns to Arizona tomorrow, and I am honored to attend his event! I am running for Congress to back up President Trump and retire impeachment-hungry O’Halleran! We must retake the House so we can pass our conservative agenda and **end the socialist democrat obstruction.** I need you to have my back right now. **The next reporting deadline is in ONE WEEK!** My Allen West, on Wednesday, June 24, at 6:00 PM ET / 3:00 PM PT](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200622com01&n=2)** on Facebook and YouTube. Together, we’ll discuss what he believes are the most critical action items for believers between now and the election, and we’ll ask Lt. Col. West your questions as we discuss the most pressing challenges our country is facing. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200622com01&n=3) Lt. Col. West has put his faith at the heart of his public service for decades. After serving in the U.S. Army for 22 years, Lt. Col. West, a highly decorated combat veteran, became the first black Republican Congressman to represent Florida in over a century. There are few believers with West’s extensive knowledge of politics and public service. Join me for this unique opportunity and submit a question to be a part of the conversation. RSVP below and mark your calendar for this Wednesday, June 24, at 6:00 PM ET / 3:00 PM PT to join us on Facebook and Youtube. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200622com01&n=4) **Pray. Think. Vote.** Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200622com01&n=5)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: One way to celebrate Pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It's Pride Month -- a time to commemorate the progress that the LGBTQ+ movement has won since Stonewall, and a moment to galvanize us to keep up the fight for full equality. I'd like to celebrate by | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e8b6/817214813/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
It's Pride Month -- a time to commemorate the progress that the LGBTQ+ movement has won since Stonewall, and a moment to galvanize us to keep up the fight for full equality.

Today, I'd like to celebrate by asking if you can help support four terrific LGBTQ+ Democratic candidates for the U.S. House of Representatives.

Two of them -- **Sharice Davids (Kansas 3rd)** and **Chris Pappas (New Hampshire 1st)** -- are running for re-election in competitive districts they flipped in 2018.

Another, **Gina Ortiz Jones (Texas 23rd)** , lost by less than 1,000 votes in 2018, jumped back in to run again in 2020, and is ready to win this November.

And **Mondaire Jones (New York 17th)** has his primary election tomorrow.

**[If you're able to make a donation right now, will you split a contribution of $2 or whatever you can chip in between Sharice Davids, Chris Pappas, Gina Ortiz Jones, Mondaire Jones, and Warren Democrats?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e8b9/817214813/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLXNkLWNwLWdvai1taiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1TMTRGX0VHUl9UQU5fRV8yMDIwMDYyMl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-sd-cp-goj-mj?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS14F_EGR_TAN_E_20200622_V1S1_P")**

I'm honored to endorse these candidates because they're fighting for an America that works for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.

**Sharice Davids** has spent her career fighting for economic equality and opportunities for working families. She made history in 2018 when she became one of the first two Native American women to serve in Congress, as well as the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent Kansas in Washington.

Sharice has been a champion for Kansas families throughout her first term, fighting to lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs, root out corruption in Washington, and end the epidemic of gun violence in this country.

**Mondaire Jones** knows that we're in a fight to put power in the hands of working families. With Mondaire in Congress, we'll gain another chance to achieve the hard-fought wins that bring us closer to big, structural change, and I'm glad to stand with him.

In these final critical hours before his primary, we need to do everything we can to fight by his side.

**Gina Ortiz Jones** was raised by a single mom on the west side of San Antonio, and she will be a tireless champion for working families in Congress.

South and West Texans need a representative who will stand up to corporate special interests and fight for quality health care, a fair and compassionate immigration system, and an economy that works for everyone. That's Gina. She's ready to flip her district and make real change in Washington.

**Chris Pappas** started working in his family's restaurant at the age of 14, and he's never stopped fighting for workers and small businesses. As a member of the New Hampshire Executive Council, he helped expand Medicaid for 53,000 working families and restore funding for Planned Parenthood.

In Congress, he's fought for clean drinking water and democracy reform, and he made history as New Hampshire's first openly gay representative.

Let's help make sure these four Democrats are all serving in Congress next year.

**Together, we can hold onto our House majority, elect Democrats up and down the ballot, and fight for every LGBTQ+ person to be able to be who they are without fear.

[Please chip in if you can to help elect Sharice Davids, Chris Pappas, Gina Ortiz Jones, and Mondaire Jones, and help support our work to elect Democrats like them who put people first.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e8b9/817214813/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLXNkLWNwLWdvai1taiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1TMTRGX0VHUl9UQU5fRV8yMDIwMDYyMl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-sd-cp-goj-mj?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS14F_EGR_TAN_E_20200622_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e8b9/817214813/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLXNkLWNwLWdvai1taiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1TMTRGX0VHUl9UQU5fRV8yMDIwMDYyMl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-sd-cp-goj-mj?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS14F_EGR_TAN_E_20200622_V1S1_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e8ac/817214813/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e8af/817214813/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e8ae/817214813/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e891/817214813/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e890/817214813/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525771/45c30650/1c929acba/66e9e893/817214813/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
---|---|---|---|---|---
